overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character walking through the historic city of Saint Denis at night during a rainstorm. The character traverses wet cobblestone streets illuminated by gas lamps, passing the Saint Denis Times Tribune building and continuing through narrow alleyways.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with newspaper building

events.description: rain begins falling steadily, creating visible streaks and wet reflections on the cobblestones

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the main cobblestone street toward the illuminated Saint Denis Times Tribune building

notable_agents.action: seated figure resting on steps against the building wall

entered.detail: large multi-story brick building with illuminated signage reading 'Saint Denis Times Tribune'
tall historic brick building with arched windows lining the left side of the street
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide cobblestone street in Saint Denis at night, approaching the illuminated Saint Denis Times Tribune building on the right. Rain begins falling around the 10-second mark, creating reflective wet surfaces. A lone seated figure rests against the building on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow side street with parked carriage

events.description: passes the Saint Denis Times Tribune building and enters a narrower side street

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the newspaper building into a narrower passage with parked horse-drawn carriages

notable_agents.action: parked horse-drawn carriage with wooden wheels on the left side of the street

entered.detail: wooden horse-drawn carriage parked along the left curb
tall brick wall running along the right side of the narrow passage
metal industrial archway spanning the street ahead with decorative ironwork

segments.scene_description: Having passed the newspaper building, the character enters a narrower cobblestone street lined with a brick wall on the right and parked carriages on the left. An industrial archway looms ahead in the distance as rain continues to fall.

events.description: passes through the metal factory archway into a more enclosed covered passage
lighting becomes significantly darker and more enclosed after passing through the archway

agents.ego_description: walking through the factory archway into a narrow covered alley with dimmer lighting

entered.detail: building with illuminated 'OFFICE' sign above the doorway on the right

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through the industrial archway, transitioning into a darker, more enclosed alley. The environment becomes shelter from the rain under the archway. An office building with a lit sign becomes visible in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with office building

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrow cobblestone alley past the office building and parked carriage

notable_agents.action: parked carriage with wooden structure on the right side of the alley

entered.detail: wooden carriage parked on the right side of the narrow alley

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the narrow back alley, passing the office building with the illuminated sign on the right. The alley remains cobblestone and wet from the rain, with another parked carriage visible ahead on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the rain-slicked streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from a wide, illuminated thoroughfare into a dark, enclosed alleyway. It begins with the character walking down a broad cobblestone street toward the glowing Saint Denis Times Tribune building as rain starts to fall, turning the ground into a reflective mirror. As the character passes the newspaper office, the scene shifts into a narrower street lined with brick walls and parked carriages, leading toward a distant industrial archway. The camera then follows the character through this archway, momentarily finding shelter from the rain before entering a dim, claustrophobic back alley. Finally, the movement continues past a lit office sign and another parked carriage, deepening the sense of isolation within the wet, narrow corridor.
